extDescription.message: Manage your YouTube subscriptions with playlists. Filter your feed by the groups you create.

optSelectPlaylist.message: Select a playlist to manage its channels
optSelectPlaylist.description: Empty state when no playlist selected

optNoChannels.message: No channels in this playlist yet. Add channels above or from YouTube.
optNoChannels.description: Empty state when playlist has no channels

optSubscriptionsSettings.description: Settings section header for subscriptions page options

optHideShorts.description: Toggle to hide the Shorts shelf on subscriptions page

optHideMostRelevant.description: Toggle to hide the Most Relevant shelf on subscriptions page
